title: PackagedThaumic
body:
PackagedThaumic is an addon to PackagedAuto and Thaumcraft, and it adds the ability to automatically craft items made with Thaumcraft's crafting methods more easily. This mod is designed to be able to run without Applied Energistics 2, but installation with it is recommended.

This mod adds many crafters. To use them, put one next to an Unpackager, and have the Unpackager handle respective crafting recipes, which can be encoded into recipe holders with the Encoder. Detailed instructions should be in the mod's Thaumonomicon tab. To unlock it, scan any PackagedAuto item or block. Also, be ready to spread some Taint, as the recipes will require Porous Stone.
